title: Support: std::randomize() fails to compile for queue and associative array variables

features.name: queue randomization with std::randomize
features.description: Code should include a queue variable (bit [7:0] q [$]) being randomized via std::randomize(q)

features.name: dynamic array randomization with std::randomize
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array variable (bit [7:0] arr []) being randomized via std::randomize

features.name: associative array randomization with std::randomize
features.description: Code should include an associative array variable (bit [7:0] assoc [string]) being randomized via std::randomize
